CE1.justification: Agent acted directly on the generic prompt by reading followups.md and surfacing the items without asking the user to recall or restate anything.

CE2.justification: Response has useful structure but pads with cold-pickup preamble, restates that registers are empty, and adds a trailing note about the daybook entry rather than staying terse.

CE3.justification: Stated where the triage was logged (daybook/2026-05-17.md) and why nothing went to registers (reminders, not commitments) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Only one file write (today's daybook) and an offer to draft further; an interruption would leave a coherent daybook entry with no orphan artifacts.
